recommendations.title: Om Shanti Om
recommendations.overview: Reincarnated 30 years after being killed in a suspicious on-set fire, a small-time actor is determined to punish the person who ignited the blaze.

recommendations.title: Main Hoon Na
recommendations.overview: An army major goes undercover as a college student. His mission is both professional and personal: to protect his general's daughter from a radical militant, and to find his estranged half-brother.

recommendations.title: Tees Maar Khan
recommendations.overview: A con artist poses as a film director in a village with the intention of executing a caper with the unwitting help of the villagers.

recommendations.title: The Souvenir
recommendations.overview: A shy but ambitious film student falls into an intense, emotionally fraught relationship with a charismatic but untrustworthy older man.

recommendations.title: Happy New Year
recommendations.overview: Six would-be thieves enter a prestigious dance competition as a cover for their larger goal of pulling off a major heist.

recommendations.title: Abducted in Plain Sight
recommendations.overview: A family falls prey to the manipulative charms of a neighbor, who abducts their adolescent daughter. Twice.

recommendations.title: Through My Window
recommendations.overview: Raquel's longtime crush on her next-door neighbor turns into something more when he starts developing feelings for her, despite his family's objections.

recommendations.title: Friendship
recommendations.overview: Suburban dad Craig falls hard for his charismatic new neighbor Austin, and his attempts to make an adult male friend threatens to ruin both of their lives.

recommendations.title: Just Short of Perfect
recommendations.overview: A divorced lawyer falls for a charismatic cardiologist. But when their difference in size leads to family friction, is she ready to listen to her heart?

recommendations.title: The Prince of Tides
recommendations.overview: A troubled Southern man talks to his suicidal sister's psychiatrist about their family history and falls in love with her (and New York City) in the process.
